marketing.hero_subtitle: Schedule, publish, and analyse social media content across 10 platforms from a single interface.
marketing.features_title: Everything you need to manage social media
marketing.feature_compose_desc: Write once, preview on every platform, and publish simultaneously with one tap.
marketing.feature_schedule_desc: Schedule posts at the best times based on your audience engagement data.
marketing.feature_analytics_desc: See your total reach, engagement, and top content across all platforms on one dashboard.
marketing.feature_team_desc: Assign posts to team members, collect approvals, and deliver client-branded reports.
marketing.pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
marketing.contact_subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.
